title: NexusOS Implementation Progress Report
summary: Current implementation status of NexusOS in multi-agent environment. Phase 1 (Boot + Hello World) COMPLETE: GNUmakefile build system, Limine v11.x boot config, framebuffer driver with VGA 8x16 font, kprintf, kernel entry. Phase 2 (Core Kernel Infrastructure) COMPLETE: GDT+TSS with IST1, 256-entry IDT with ISR stubs (iretq), PIC remap (IRQ0-15 -> INT32-47), PMM bitmap allocator, VMM 4-level paging (reusing Limine tables), kernel heap (free-list with coalescing), PIT timer (1ms), PS/2 controller/keyboard/mouse drivers, input manager ring buffer, spinlocks. Build: GCC with 0 errors, 0 C warnings, nexusos-x86_64.iso generated. 35 source files total. Phase 3 (Terminal, Shell, FS) is the next scheduled phase.
